summary:
SCAM WARNINGS AND FINANCIAL INTEGRITY: Brandon addresses ongoing issues involving individuals impersonating him on applications like WhatsApp and Facebook Messenger to solicit funds. Brandon clarifies that he never asks for money through these platforms and urges vigilance against these fraudulent activities.

CRYPTOCURRENCY PREDICTIONS AND ECONOMIC FORECASTS: Brandon recounts his visions regarding a significant rise in cryptocurrency tied to Donald Trump. Brandon states that the United States government, alongside nations like Japan and Australia, will heavily invest in cryptocurrency. Brandon references the rapid appreciation of specific digital assets like Solana and Trump-affiliated coins, framing this as a fulfillment of a previous prediction regarding the sudden emergence of deca-millionaires. Brandon also issues a caution about potential rug pulls resulting in rapid financial losses. Furthermore, Brandon anticipates an economic surge following the 20th, claiming that a planned economic crash was averted due to collective prayer.

PRESIDENT TRUMP'S FINANCIAL AND LEGAL RESTORATION: Brandon discusses Donald Trump's recent financial gains, asserting that Trump received a massive return from cryptocurrency investments that compensated for his financial losses related to lawsuits and settlements. Brandon frames this wealth transfer as a supernatural reward for Trump's sacrifices for the nation, suggesting that similar rapid financial turnarounds are accessible to others.

MINISTRY CONFERENCES AND REPORTED MIRACLES: Brandon shares experiences from a recent conference in Tulsa, following an appearance with Alex Jones. Brandon describes an encounter with a man whose hands reportedly produced oil, leading to a strong physical reaction when prayed over. Additionally, Brandon recounts stories involving a pastor named Brian from Amarillo, Texas, who has allegedly witnessed individuals being resurrected during church services. Brandon also mentions meeting a Ukrainian couple and predicts that 2025 will be a year of acceleration for individuals trying to have children.

POLITICAL AND GLOBAL PRAYER DIRECTIVES: Brandon outlines specific prayer focuses, including divine protection for Donald Trump's upcoming inauguration against threats such as drones and snipers, as well as wisdom for his administration and family members Eric, Don Jr., and Barron. Brandon also directs prayers toward political figures, including restoration for Joe Biden during his retirement and a spiritual awakening for Kamala Harris. Additionally, Brandon includes prayers for international shifts, specifically mentioning the fall of communist leadership like Xi Jinping's in China.
rawData: [January 19, 2025]-[Can you believe Trump coin – wow - praying for President Trump]-[https://youtu.be/8muAQEFYaHA]-[Hey, good morning family, praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me today. We're going to pray for President Trump, but first I want to say thank you all for the 500,000 subscribers! I think we're almost at 558,000. Wow, y'all are coming from everywhere, and we just want to say thank you for joining us. It's a huge deal from where I was a year ago; at this time last year, I wasn't even at 100,000 people yet. This is amazing what the Lord has done. We just want to say thank you for joining us and praying with us. Another thing: there are a lot of people saying through certain apps that I am asking you for money. We will never ask for money on this channel, ever. I put the links below because people have said they wanted to bless our family, but I have never asked or solicited anybody for money on WhatsApp. Do not fall for any scams on Facebook Messenger. I do not talk to anybody on Facebook Messenger. We will never ask you for money. We're never going to do any of those things that these people are trying to scam you with. Please do not fall for these scams. These people are very cruel and obviously from the devil. It's just awful. We love you and we pray for you, but be careful out there. Don't let these people take advantage of you. Back to what I was saying: it's amazing how Trump's coin is going up. People who invested when it first started—I think Bren was telling me—a guy invested a million dollars and it turned into 155 million. That was back when it was around $20 per coin, and now it's around $67. Whatever Trump puts his hands to prospers. I never saw that coming. The Lord showed me that the United States government, during President Trump's term, would pump a trillion dollars into crypto. Then I saw Japan, Australia, and other nations joining in. I believe this will be a time of great acceleration where the wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous. I warned you all about the top five back then. Solana was one of those, and Trump aligned his coin with Solana. When the Lord spoke to me about that coin, it was only $40, and now it's up to almost $300 per coin. Hearing the voice of the Lord is so vital in these last days. Having a foundation in the Word of God and hearing Him daily is important because He told me there will be rug pulls where people lose everything in a matter of 24 hours. I told you there would be a time in a 24-hour period where there would be deca-millionaires, and that happened with Trump's coin. That prophetic word was fulfilled. If you were a Trump follower—and they weren't on Truth Social to be able to see that—I am not on it yet, but I am going to have my own account for Truth Social. In a time frame of less than 24 hours, people who invested a little bit of money got 155 million at the beginning. It happened in six hours. I'm doing the best I can to describe what I see coming. I see a rocket ship taking off after the 20th with the economy. The Lord said a great economy crash was planned, but because of the saints praying in October, there is a window of opportunity to get your house in order. Like Joseph was granted seven years of blessing and seven years of famine, I believe this is a window. I told you about Solana and look at the blessing that's happening. It was at $40 and now it's at $300. We give God all the glory for it. It's fun to be watching what the Lord is doing with President Trump. I saw this in 2023 and told my son privately. He warned me about XRPs; to see it go from 20 cents to $3.30 and then fall back down is amazing. Don't let haters get to you. I'm not telling you to invest; I'm telling you to watch and pray. The deca-millionaire prophecy came to pass. When you get excited about someone else's blessing, that's a heart thing. You have to rejoice with your brother when they get their blessing. I pray that someone in the body of Christ did it also. Let's pray for President Trump right now and for his family. Before all the attacks and lawsuits, even after he had to pay that lady—I think it was 200 million—he got 54 billion in return off that coin in the last 48 hours. Everything the devil stole, he got back more than a hundredfold. He's been sowing his own personal finances to save America. Seed time and harvest has accelerated. God is a rewarder of those who diligently seek Him. To hear that Trump got a return of 54 billion from that cryptocoin, I thought, 'Lord, You're restoring what the cankerworm ate for this man who has sacrificed his life to turn around this nation.' What God did for him, God will do for you. God is no respecter of persons. He will take something that is nothing and make it like the fishes and the loaves. I want you to believe for a 24-hour turnaround. It's a supernatural wealth transfer. Father, I thank You. What You did for them, You will do for me. We went to a conference and met a couple from Ukraine believing for a baby. I believe 2025 is a time for great acceleration in having children. God will restore the time the cankerworm ate. Even if you think you're getting old, He is a restorer of time. We're going to take communion together and believe for protection for President Trump. This is going to be a great year. You 500,000 followers are awake in Christ. I met a man yesterday who had glory and oil coming from his hands. I saw it with my own eyes. He prayed for my hands and I felt the fire of the Holy Spirit so strong it knocked me on my hiney. I fell backwards in the power of God. The impartation changed me from the inside out. I needed a fresh drink after doing Alex Jones. We drove down to Tulsa for a conference. A pastor there named Brian from Amarillo, Texas, prayed for me. He has seen people raised from the dead in his church. Expectation brings manifestation. Thank you for being a part of our ministry as our channels take off in China, the Philippines, and France. We're anticipating great things in 2025. Brian's wife gave a prophetic word that someone would live and not die, and then a man died in the back of the church. Brian prayed, and he got up from the dead. It happened twice. This is the time we're looking for. The wealth of the wicked is being laid up for the righteous. The blessing hits the leadership and flows down to the people. Father, we thank You for Your body that was broken for us. No weapon formed against us shall prosper. We walk in divine health. We make much of the blood today. We plead the blood of Jesus over our families. Like Lester Sumrall taught us, a curse without a cause cannot stand. We say no weapon formed against us will prosper. We pray for President Trump's inauguration. We pray for protection from drones, snipers, or bombs. We pray for supernatural wisdom for him like Solomon. Every plot of the wicked will be uncovered from sea to shining sea. We pray for Eric, Don Jr., Barron, and his grandchildren. We pray for repentance in the Oval Office and Congress. We pray for a radical move of the spirit of God. We call our unsaved loved ones saved and take the blinders off their eyes. We thank You for restoring marriages. We believe tomorrow will be a good day for President Trump. Every plan of the wicked across this nation will be uncovered in the name of Jesus. We pray for President Biden that he would find You and find restoration for his mind in retirement. We pray for Kamala Harris to have an eye-opening experience with Jesus. We pray for a supernatural harvest of souls in South Korea, China, and across Asia. We pray that leadership will cause communistic parties, like Xi Jinping's, to fall. We are all in for Jesus. The best is yet to come. The former and the latter rain are here. Subscribe and hit the notification bell. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you. God bless you and see you tomorrow.]
